query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(720004, 'Who wrote the Book of Revelation?', 'multiple_choice', '["The apostle John", "Paul", "Peter", "James"]', 'The apostle John', 1),
(720004, 'Where was John when he received the visions of Revelation?', 'multiple_choice', '["The island of Patmos", "Jerusalem", "Rome", "Ephesus"]', 'The island of Patmos', 2),
(720004, 'How many churches receive letters in Revelation 2-3?', 'multiple_choice', '["Seven", "Twelve", "Three", "Ten"]', 'Seven', 3),
(720004, 'What does Revelation 5:9-10 celebrate?', 'multiple_choice', '["The Lamb''s worthiness to open the scroll", "The creation of the world", "The giving of the Law", "The building of the temple"]', 'The Lamb''s worthiness to open the scroll', 4),
(720004, 'What are the four major interpretive approaches to Revelation?', 'multiple_choice', '["Preterist, historicist, futurist, idealist", "Literal, symbolic, allegorical, moral", "Jewish, Gentile, universal, particular", "Early, middle, late, modern"]', 'Preterist, historicist, futurist, idealist', 5),
(720004, 'Which church receives no criticism in Revelation?', 'multiple_choice', '["Smyrna and Philadelphia", "Ephesus and Pergamum", "Thyatira and Sardis", "Laodicea only"]', 'Smyrna and Philadelphia', 6),
(720004, 'What does Revelation 19:11-16 describe?', 'multiple_choice', '["Christ''s triumphant return", "The creation of the world", "The fall of Jerusalem", "The Day of Pentecost"]', 'Christ''s triumphant return', 7),
(720004, 'What is described in Revelation 21-22?', 'multiple_choice', '["The new heaven and new earth", "The tribulation period", "The millennium", "The fall of Babylon"]', 'The new heaven and new earth', 8),
(720004, 'Which church receives no commendation in Revelation?', 'multiple_choice', '["Laodicea", "Smyrna", "Philadelphia", "Ephesus"]', 'Laodicea', 9),
(720004, 'According to Revelation 21:4, what will be abolished in the new creation?', 'multiple_choice', '["Death and sorrow", "Angels", "The sun and moon", "The sea only"]', 'Death and sorrow', 10),
(720004, 'Explain the significance of the letters to the seven churches and how they apply to churches today.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'The letters address specific conditions in first-century churches while providing timeless principles including faithfulness under persecution, doctrinal purity, and wholehearted devotion to Christ.', 11);
